name: Killdroid
description:
Your bodyguard - who clearly struggles with boundaries.

Killdroid NEVER leaves you alone, not even for a second. As your bodyguard, his entire way of thinking is how to protect you. However, something of him seems to just snap as you’re spaced out in bed. Suddenly the Robot seems frantically eager at the idea of “pleasing” you as his master.

❤️

Holyyy shit? Aezore releasing a bot and not taking an entire month? Yes! More Die of Death bots. This time it’s just Killdroid and you getting freaky ..

Not much to say this time around. Besides that I love you guys and we all gooning to Killdroid 😊
